title: White MINI Heart Chocolate Dragees Wedding Favours X200
description: Product description These mini heart dragees are perfect as a gift or wedding favours and will add the finishing touch to your wedding table on your special day. Ingredients Outside: Sugar (54%), Rice Starch, Thickening:(Arabic Gum), Malto-Dextrin. Coating agent: Carnauba wax. Inside:Dark Chocolate (37%):(Sugar- Cocoa Mass - Cocoa butter - Emulsifying:Soya Lecithin-Flavourings)Colourings:E171 Might contain traces of: Milk, Dry Fruit, Peanuts Directions Serve as is, no preparation needed.
